name: The Crystal Cave: Mana Field
desc:
If a Spellcaster monster(s) would be Special Summoned from your Deck,
you can place this card face-up from your Deck in your Spell & Trap Zone instead.
All monsters on the field become Spellcaster monsters.
Each time a Spell Card or its effect resolves, place 1 Mana Counter on this card.
All Spellcaster monsters you control gain 100 ATK for each Mana Counter on this card,
and all Spellcaster monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK for each Mana Counter on this card.
Monsters on the field with 0 ATK have their effects negated.
strings: Place "The Crystal Cave: Mana Field" instead
